notableEvents.label: Tyler Soderstrom GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Soderstrom grounds into a double play, second baseman Chase Meidroth to shortstop Colson Montgomery to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Nick Kurtz out at 2nd. Tyler Soderstrom out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Max Muncy GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Max Muncy grounds into a double play, shortstop Colson Montgomery to second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Carlos Cortes out at 2nd. Max Muncy out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andy Ibáñez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andy Ibáñez grounds out, third baseman Miguel Vargas to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Max Muncy scores.

notableEvents.label: Zack Gelof pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Zack Gelof grounds out, shortstop Colson Montgomery to first baseman Munetaka Murakami.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Luisangel Acuña steals (5) 3rd base. Munetaka Murakami to 2nd. Munetaka Murakami advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman Jeff McNeil.

notableEvents.label: Munetaka Murakami grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Munetaka Murakami hits a grand slam (6) to center field. Chase Meidroth scores. Luisangel Acuña scores. Andrew Benintendi scores.
